task: I need to send a quick note to my supervisor about a schedule change that came up today. Can you help me put it into a clear message that would be easy to read and send?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a short, clear version you can send:

**Hi [Supervisor’s Name], I wanted to let you know that a schedule change came up today. I’m still able to cover [the shift / the updated time], but I wanted to make sure you were aware. Please let me know if you need anything else from me.**

If you want, I can also make it:
- more formal
- more casual
- shorter
- specific to your exact schedule change

user_simulator.text:
Yeah, close. But make it a little plainer, less fluffy. I don’t want all that “if you need anything else” stuff unless it matters.

Something like:

Hi [Supervisor’s Name], a schedule change came up today. I can still cover [shift/time], but I wanted to let you know. Please let me know if you need me to adjust anything.

If you want, make it even shorter, like a text message.

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a plainer version:

**Hi [Supervisor’s Name], a schedule change came up today. I can still cover [shift/time], but I wanted to let you know. Please let me know if you need me to adjust anything.**

If you want, I can also make it:
- even shorter
- more professional
- more like a text message

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Plain and easy to read.
